action.reasoning: Observation: Training val_r2=0.5564 but eval mean_r2=-3.6B due to ptend_q R²=-8.4B. Other groups are fine (ptend_t=0.61, radiation=0.96, precipitation=0.81). Analysis: A few ptend_q features (likely upper-atmosphere humidity tendency with near-zero test variance) cause catastrophic negative R² that dominates the mean. Even small prediction errors on near-zero-variance features produce R² of -billions. Decision: (1) Add output clamping to model (prevent extreme predictions), (2) Compute per-feature R² on validation set, save zero_mask for features with negative val R², (3) In predict.py, replace predictions for masked features with feature mean (~0), (4) Clip final predictions to [-5,5]. Retrain for 20 epochs.
